The Bundesagentur für Arbeit, Germany's Federal Employment Agency, is in charge of this online portal, which is intended to assist people in locating and applying to a variety of educational and training opportunities around the nation. On our English site we provide the key figures on the German labour market, which are updated monthly, as well as a report on the European labour market situation. Bundesagentur für Arbeit f (proper noun, genitive Bundesagentur für Arbeit) Federal Employment Agency (a German federal agency responsible for managing job centers across Germany and administering unemployment benefits) Synonyms: Agentur für Arbeit, Arbeitsagentur, Arbeitsamt All you have to know about live, study,work in Germany. All information for people from other countries. The Bundesagentur für Arbeit (BA for short, AA or Arbeitsagentur) (' Federal Employment Agency') is a German federal agency under the Federal Ministry for Labour and Social Affairs. Its headquarters are in Nuremberg. Its director is Andrea Nahles. [1] The BA manages job centres across Germany and administers unemployment benefits. The agency is further divided into Arbeitsagentur and Jobcenter. The Agentur für Arbeit (Bundesagentur für Arbeit, Arbeitsagentur, BA or AfA) is responsible for unemployment benefits and the German labour market. All information for people from other countries. The German Arbeitsagentur, commonly referred to as the Jobcenter in English, serves as a pivotal institution for job seekers and employees alike in Germany. Established under the Federal Employment Agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit), the Jobcentre plays a crucial role in the country’s labor market, overseeing a wide range of services from job placement to unemployment benefits. Find your job online Do you already know in which profession you would like to work? Do you already possess a vocational qualification or are experienced in a certain field? Then you may search for matching positions in Germany’s major job board, the Jobsuche (available only in German). You may also narrow your search down, for example according to City or Federal State Working hours (full Sie haben eine Frage oder ein Anliegen? Dann nutzen Sie unser Kontaktformular.
